summary: Iteration 49 - Verified P0 fix for legal report formatting. The .legal-report CSS class is correctly applied across ReportView.jsx, ReportsSection.jsx, and BarristerView.jsx. All styling features verified working: tables with blue headers and alternating rows, clickable blue underlined links, properly formatted headings and lists, blockquotes. Export buttons (Print/PDF/Word) visible on all screen sizes including mobile.
